TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-tradition_dakis 2021s
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: m ma mesa kingan kari a bnhanganmu inu ima di rdrudan a alangta hiya ha.
S.PHON: m ma mesa kiŋan kaɾi a bnħaŋanmu inu ima di ɾdɾudan a alaŋta ħija ħa.
S.FORM: m ma mesa kingan kari a bnhanganmu inu ima di rdrudan a alangta hiya ha.
S.PHON: m ma mesa kiŋan kaɾi a bnħaŋanmu inu ima di ɾdɾudan a alaŋta ħija ħa.
S.TRANSL: 這是一個我從我們部落族老們聽來的故事.
Here is a story that I heard from the elders of our tribe.

S.FORM: ani naq uxe uxe wano bale a alangta gluban ha kana alang nakahara ma alang tongan peni.
S.PHON: ani naq uxe uxe wano bale a alaŋta gluban ħa kana alaŋ nakaħaɾa ma alaŋ toŋan peni.
S.FORM: ani naq uxe uxe wano bale a alangta gluban ha kana alang nakahara ma alang tongan peni.
S.PHON: ani naq uxe uxe wano bale a alaŋta gluban ħa kana alaŋ nakaħaɾa ma alaŋ toŋan peni.

TRANSL.notes: 這不僅僅是(流傳在)我們清流部落,還有中原部落和眉溪部落.

S.TRANSL: 這不僅僅是 我們清流部落,還有中原部落和眉溪部落.

TRANSL.notes: (It goes) not only in our Gluban tribe, but also in Nakahara and Tongan.

S.TRANSL: not only in our Gluban tribe, but also in Nakahara and Tongan.

S.FORM: kesaun ita seediq si na.
S.PHON: kesaun ita seediq si na.
S.FORM: kesaun ita seediq si na.
S.PHON: kesaun ita seediq si na.
S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克人.
We Seediq.

S.FORM: netunta so mhuqin na heita wada mhuqin w wano heita wada mhuqin kiya mesa.
S.PHON: netunta so mħuqin na ħeita wada mħuqin w wano ħeita wada mħuqin kija mesa.
S.FORM: netunta so mhuqin na heita wada mhuqin w wano heita wada mhuqin kiya mesa.
S.PHON: netunta so mħuqin na ħeita wada mħuqin w wano ħeita wada mħuqin kija mesa.
S.TRANSL: 若是我們死亡,那只有我們肉體的死亡.
If we die, only our body dies.

S.FORM: ma eniqan kesaun utuxta na ini qhu an ani dehuk knuwan we ini qhuqin kiya.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kesaun utuxta na ini qħu an ani deħuk knuwan we ini qħuqin kija.
S.FORM: ma eniqan kesaun utuxta na ini qhu an ani dehuk knuwan we ini qhuqin kiya.
S.PHON: ma eniqan kesaun utuxta na ini qħu an ani deħuk knuwan we ini qħuqin kija.
S.TRANSL: 我們所謂的靈體,不論到何時,是不會死亡的.

TRANSL.notes: What we call "Utux (soul)," whenever it is, does not die.

S.TRANSL: What we call "Utux ," whenever it is, does not die.

S.FORM: ma ma mhuqin ka heita ciida di na musa naq inu di skadi utuxta rudanta cbeyo ma musa msuupu hiya mesa karidaha.
S.PHON: ma ma mħuqin ka ħeita ʦiida di na musa naq inu di skadi utuxta ɾudanta ʦbejo ma musa msuupu ħija mesa kaɾidaħa.
S.FORM: ma ma mhuqin ka heita ciida di na musa naq inu di skadi utuxta rudanta cbeyo ma musa msuupu hiya mesa karidaha.
S.PHON: ma ma mħuqin ka ħeita ʦiida di na musa naq inu di skadi utuxta ɾudanta ʦbejo ma musa msuupu ħija mesa kaɾidaħa.

TRANSL.notes: 他們說,當我們的肉體死亡時,我們去找我們先祖的靈體,然後(跟祂們)在一起在那裡.

S.TRANSL: 他們說,當我們的肉體死亡時,我們去找我們先祖的靈體,然後 在一起在那裡.

TRANSL.notes: They say, when our body dies, we go to find our ancestor's soul and then stay together (with them) there.

S.TRANSL: They say, when our body dies, we go to find our ancestor's soul and then stay together there.

S.FORM: ma mesa ka kari rudan.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka kaɾi ɾudan.
S.FORM: ma mesa ka kari rudan.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka kaɾi ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 部落的長者是這樣說的.
Elderly people say so.

S.FORM: m lmngelungku ciida na kesaunmu ka rudan.
S.PHON: m lmŋeluŋku ʦiida na kesaunmu ka ɾudan.
S.FORM: m lmngelungku ciida na kesaunmu ka rudan.
S.PHON: m lmŋeluŋku ʦiida na kesaunmu ka ɾudan.
S.TRANSL: 我當時想一想,我對長者們說.
I thought about the story at that time, and said to the elderly people.

S.FORM: m ma so hari ka musa kyokay maha mmaha tenggoku nii di kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: m ma so ħaɾi ka musa kjokaj maħa mmaħa teŋgoku nii di kesaunmu ma.
S.FORM: m ma so hari ka musa kyokay maha mmaha tenggoku nii di kesaunmu ma.
S.PHON: m ma so ħaɾi ka musa kjokaj maħa mmaħa teŋgoku nii di kesaunmu ma.

TRANSL.notes: 這就像上教會(聽到)的上天堂,我那時候想.

S.TRANSL: 這就像上教會 的上天堂,我那時候想.
This is like going to the heaven, which is heard in the church, I thought then.

S.FORM: dm ciida wa rudan tmgesa yaku ciida mbahangku ciida we.
S.PHON: dm ʦiida wa ɾudan tmgesa jaku ʦiida mbaħaŋku ʦiida we.
S.FORM: dm ciida wa rudan tmgesa yaku ciida mbahangku ciida we.
S.PHON: dm ʦiida wa ɾudan tmgesa jaku ʦiida mbaħaŋku ʦiida we.
S.TRANSL: 那時我聽到族老教我.
At that time, I heard the elderly taught me.

S.FORM: sa kchayaunmu cmiyuk smiling ka rudan ciida.
S.PHON: sa kʦħajaunmu ʦmijuk smiliŋ ka ɾudan ʦiida.
S.FORM: sa kchayaunmu cmiyuk smiling ka rudan ciida.
S.PHON: sa kʦħajaunmu ʦmijuk smiliŋ ka ɾudan ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 我是這樣反問族老的.
I asked a question in reply to the elderly like this.

S.FORM: ma mesa ka rudan uxe uxe uxe qnbahangan a kyokay nii.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka ɾudan uxe uxe uxe qnbaħaŋan a kjokaj nii.
S.FORM: ma mesa ka rudan uxe uxe uxe qnbahangan a kyokay nii.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka ɾudan uxe uxe uxe qnbaħaŋan a kjokaj nii.
S.TRANSL: 族老們說:「這不是教會聽來的.」
The elderly said, 'This is not heard from the church.'

S.FORM: karita naq ba rudan ba pe peeyah peyah cbeyo nii kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: kaɾita naq ba ɾudan ba pe peejaħ pejaħ ʦbejo nii kesaunkuna.
S.FORM: karita naq ba rudan ba pe peeyah peyah cbeyo nii kesaunkuna.
S.PHON: kaɾita naq ba ɾudan ba pe peejaħ pejaħ ʦbejo nii kesaunkuna.
S.TRANSL: 他們告訴我這個我們自己的故事真的是傳自於我們的祖先.
They told me our own story really comes from our ancestors.

S.FORM: o mkela.
S.PHON: o mkela.
S.FORM: o mkela.
S.PHON: o mkela.

TRANSL.notes: 哦,(我)知道了.

S.TRANSL: 哦, 知道了.

TRANSL.notes: Oh, (I) understood.

S.TRANSL: Oh, understood.

S.FORM: kika bsiyaqku hari lmngelung kari nii ma kika.
S.PHON: kika bsijaqku ħaɾi lmŋeluŋ kaɾi nii ma kika.
S.FORM: kika bsiyaqku hari lmngelung kari nii ma kika.
S.PHON: kika bsijaqku ħaɾi lmŋeluŋ kaɾi nii ma kika.
S.TRANSL: 因此我對這樣的話語想了好一陣子.
Therefore I thought about this story for quite a while.

S.FORM: o kela naq bale bale eniqan so nii karita mesaku lu mesaku lmngelung ciida.
S.PHON: o kela naq bale bale eniqan so nii kaɾita mesaku lu mesaku lmŋeluŋ ʦiida.
S.FORM: o kela naq bale bale eniqan so nii karita mesaku lu mesaku lmngelung ciida.
S.PHON: o kela naq bale bale eniqan so nii kaɾita mesaku lu mesaku lmŋeluŋ ʦiida.
S.TRANSL: 「原來我們有這樣的故事,」我那時候想.
"It turns out that such story exists in our people," I thought at that time.

S.FORM: kika karina nii nii ciida de spatismu di.
S.PHON: kika kaɾina nii nii ʦiida de spatismu di.
S.FORM: kika karina nii nii ciida de spatismu di.
S.PHON: kika kaɾina nii nii ʦiida de spatismu di.
S.TRANSL: 所以當時我才將這些話寫下來.
Therefore, I wrote down these words then.

S.FORM: ma mesa ka karidaha.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka kaɾidaħa.
S.FORM: ma mesa ka karidaha.
S.PHON: ma mesa ka kaɾidaħa.
S.TRANSL: 他們的話是這樣說的.
Their words go like this.

S.FORM: e ita kesaun seediq na netunta mgedang peni mhuqinta wa m kika asita muda muda hako utux.
S.PHON: e ita kesaun seediq na netunta mgedaŋ peni mħuqinta wa m kika asita muda muda ħako utux.
S.FORM: e ita kesaun seediq na netunta mgedang peni mhuqinta wa m kika asita muda muda hako utux.
S.PHON: e ita kesaun seediq na netunta mgedaŋ peni mħuqinta wa m kika asita muda muda ħako utux.
S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克人,如果我們身故,我們一定會行過祖靈橋.
We Seediq, if we die, we must go through the soul bridge.

S.FORM: kesaun utuxta peni na asi ka muda hako utux.
S.PHON: kesaun utuxta peni na asi ka muda ħako utux.
S.FORM: kesaun utuxta peni na asi ka muda hako utux.
S.PHON: kesaun utuxta peni na asi ka muda ħako utux.
S.TRANSL: 我們所謂的靈體必須行過祖靈橋.
Our so-called soul must go through the soul bridge.

S.FORM: moodata hako utux ciida na asita muda pqita baga.
S.PHON: moodata ħako utux ʦiida na asita muda pqita baga.
S.FORM: moodata hako utux ciida na asita muda pqita baga.
S.PHON: moodata ħako utux ʦiida na asita muda pqita baga.
S.TRANSL: 當我們行過祖靈橋時,手一定要被檢視.

TRANSL.notes: When we pass the soul bridge, we must have (our) hands examined.

S.TRANSL: When we pass the soul bridge, we must have hands examined.

S.FORM: n eniqan naq ka rudanta ga a maanu di mqita baga ga hiya sa.
S.PHON: n eniqan naq ka ɾudanta ga a maanu di mqita baga ga ħija sa.
S.FORM: n eniqan naq ka rudanta ga a maanu di mqita baga ga hiya sa.
S.PHON: n eniqan naq ka ɾudanta ga a maanu di mqita baga ga ħija sa.

TRANSL.notes: 那裡自然會有我們的祖先檢視(我們)的手.

S.TRANSL: 那裡自然會有我們的祖先檢視 的手.

TRANSL.notes: There will naturally be our ancestors examining (our) hands.

S.TRANSL: There will naturally be our ancestors examining hands.

S.FORM: rseno anaq anaq rseno anaq mqedin na mntena kana a m kugahunna bagasu.
S.PHON: ɾseno anaq anaq ɾseno anaq mqedin na mntena kana a m kugaħunna bagasu.
S.FORM: rseno anaq anaq rseno anaq mqedin na mntena kana a m kugahunna bagasu.
S.PHON: ɾseno anaq anaq ɾseno anaq mqedin na mntena kana a m kugaħunna bagasu.
S.TRANSL: 男的女的都一樣,他都打開你的手.
Man and woman are all equal. He opens your hands.

S.FORM: e ta qitaeta bagasu kesaunsuna asisu naq pqitaan kana daha baga wa uxe wano kingan.
S.PHON: e ta qitaeta bagasu kesaunsuna asisu naq pqitaan kana daħa baga wa uxe wano kiŋan.
S.FORM: e ta qitaeta bagasu kesaunsuna asisu naq pqitaan kana daha baga wa uxe wano kingan.
S.PHON: e ta qitaeta bagasu kesaunsuna asisu naq pqitaan kana daħa baga wa uxe wano kiŋan.
S.TRANSL: 「讓我們來看看你的手,」他跟你說.你一定要讓他看雙手,不是只有一隻.
"Let's see your hands," he tells tou. You must let him see both your hands, instead of only one.

S.FORM: ma ma psa pqitaunsu berahna na.
S.PHON: ma ma psa pqitaunsu beɾaħna na.
S.FORM: ma ma psa pqitaunsu berahna na.
S.PHON: ma ma psa pqitaunsu beɾaħna na.

TRANSL.notes: 然後你給他看,(手)放到他前面.

S.TRANSL: 然後你給他看, 放到他前面.

TRANSL.notes: Then you let him see and put (you hands) in front of him.

S.TRANSL: Then you let him see and put in front of him.

S.FORM: qmita ka a maanu di qapan bagata.
S.PHON: qmita ka a maanu di qapan bagata.
S.FORM: qmita ka a maanu di qapan bagata.
S.PHON: qmita ka a maanu di qapan bagata.
S.TRANSL: 他會檢視我們的手掌.
He will examine our palms.

S.FORM: netun so mgdara bagasu na anaq m ani naq mqedin ani naq rseno mgdara bagasu de podaunsuna hako utux nii ka isu deh denu.
S.PHON: netun so mgdaɾa bagasu na anaq m ani naq mqedin ani naq ɾseno mgdaɾa bagasu de podaunsuna ħako utux nii ka isu deħ denu.
S.FORM: netun so mgdara bagasu na anaq m ani naq mqedin ani naq rseno mgdara bagasu de podaunsuna hako utux nii ka isu deh denu.
S.PHON: netun so mgdaɾa bagasu na anaq m ani naq mqedin ani naq ɾseno mgdaɾa bagasu de podaunsuna ħako utux nii ka isu deħ denu.
S.TRANSL: 不論男的女的,如果你的手有血痕,他就會讓你過這座祖靈橋.就這樣.
Whether you are a man or woman, if your hands are blood-stained, he will let you pass this soul bridge. That's all.

W.TRANSL: 使役-通過-受焦-2SG.屬格-3SG.主格

S.FORM: ma bale ba m mgdara su bagasu di na kiya kndalaxsu puting hako hini we musasu dehuk puting hiya m mkkesa m musasu tlangan a p kesaunna tlangan a utuxta rudan cbeyo peni na.
S.PHON: ma bale ba m mgdaɾa su bagasu di na kija kndalaxsu putiŋ ħako ħini we musasu deħuk putiŋ ħija m mkkesa m musasu tlaŋan a p kesaunna tlaŋan a utuxta ɾudan ʦbejo peni na.
S.FORM: ma bale ba m mgdara su bagasu di na kiya kndalaxsu puting hako hini we musasu dehuk puting hiya m mkkesa m musasu tlangan a p kesaunna tlangan a utuxta rudan cbeyo peni na.
S.PHON: ma bale ba m mgdaɾa su bagasu di na kija kndalaxsu putiŋ ħako ħini we musasu deħuk putiŋ ħija m mkkesa m musasu tlaŋan a p kesaunna tlaŋan a utuxta ɾudan ʦbejo peni na.
S.TRANSL: 若你的手真留有血痕,你就可以從橋的這一端,到那一端,走到祖靈之地,所謂我們祖先聚集的地方.
If your hands are really blood-stained, you can go from this end to that end, and walk to the place of soul, the so-called gathering place of our ancestors.

S.FORM: ani si netun bagasu na ini pgdara di na uxesu pdehuk sipo sa.
S.PHON: ani si netun bagasu na ini pgdaɾa di na uxesu pdeħuk sipo sa.
S.FORM: ani si netun bagasu na ini pgdara di na uxesu pdehuk sipo sa.
S.PHON: ani si netun bagasu na ini pgdaɾa di na uxesu pdeħuk sipo sa.
S.TRANSL: 但是,如果你的手沒有血痕,你就到不了對岸.
However, if your hands are not blood-stained, you cannot reach the other side.

S.FORM: mudasu tuting cceka di na mkkesasu na mlgelu paru ka hako dehuk si.
S.PHON: mudasu tutiŋ ʦʦeka di na mkkesasu na mlgelu paɾu ka ħako deħuk si.
S.FORM: mudasu tuting cceka di na mkkesasu na mlgelu paru ka hako dehuk si.
S.PHON: mudasu tutiŋ ʦʦeka di na mkkesasu na mlgelu paɾu ka ħako deħuk si.
S.TRANSL: 你走到中間的時候,橋會搖晃得很厲害.
When you walk halfway, the bridge will shake violently.

S.FORM: kika mtutingsu maanu di mtutingsu ruru truma kii denu mesa.
S.PHON: kika mtutiŋsu maanu di mtutiŋsu ɾuɾu tɾuma kii denu mesa.
S.FORM: kika mtutingsu maanu di mtutingsu ruru truma kii denu mesa.
S.PHON: kika mtutiŋsu maanu di mtutiŋsu ɾuɾu tɾuma kii denu mesa.
S.TRANSL: 所以你會跌落到那很深的溪谷底.
So you will fall down into the deep stream gorge.

S.FORM: ma kika eniqan kesaundaha a utux karang paru ga mtara hii sa.
S.PHON: ma kika eniqan kesaundaħa a utux kaɾaŋ paɾu ga mtaɾa ħii sa.
S.FORM: ma kika eniqan kesaundaha a utux karang paru ga mtara hii sa.
S.PHON: ma kika eniqan kesaundaħa a utux kaɾaŋ paɾu ga mtaɾa ħii sa.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻很大他們所說的「螃蟹精」在那裡等.
There is a big what they call "crab spirit" waiting there.

S.FORM: kiya ka meekan seediq a maanu di mntuting hiya mesa.
S.PHON: kija ka meekan seediq a maanu di mntutiŋ ħija mesa.
S.FORM: kiya ka meekan seediq a maanu di mntuting hiya mesa.
S.PHON: kija ka meekan seediq a maanu di mntutiŋ ħija mesa.

TRANSL.notes: (祂)會吃掉落到那裡的人.

S.TRANSL: 會吃掉落到那裡的人.

TRANSL.notes: (It) will eat people who fall down there.

S.TRANSL: will eat people who fall down there.

S.FORM: ma dungusna nii peni na kesaun seediq mgdara baga nii peni rseno ge asi ka seediq mnangan tunux.
S.PHON: ma duŋusna nii peni na kesaun seediq mgdaɾa baga nii peni ɾseno ge asi ka seediq mnaŋan tunux.
S.FORM: ma dungusna nii peni na kesaun seediq mgdara baga nii peni rseno ge asi ka seediq mnangan tunux.
S.PHON: ma duŋusna nii peni na kesaun seediq mgdaɾa baga nii peni ɾseno ge asi ka seediq mnaŋan tunux.
S.TRANSL: 這個的意思是,手有血痕的人之中,男人一定是獵首過的.
The meaning of this is, of the people with blood-stained hands, men must be those who have hunted heads.

S.FORM: kesaun mangan tunux nii cbeyo na qmlahang kmdakan alang ka kiya.
S.PHON: kesaun maŋan tunux nii ʦbejo na qmlaħaŋ kmdakan alaŋ ka kija.
S.FORM: kesaun mangan tunux nii cbeyo na qmlahang kmdakan alang ka kiya.
S.PHON: kesaun maŋan tunux nii ʦbejo na qmlaħaŋ kmdakan alaŋ ka kija.
S.TRANSL: 以前所謂的獵首是要保衛部落的.
In the past, the so-called head-hunting was to protect the tribe.

S.FORM: uxe kesaun mkmhemucta mangan tunux uxe km mkmhemuc maanu di smipaq seediq.
S.PHON: uxe kesaun mkmħemuʦta maŋan tunux uxe km mkmħemuʦ maanu di smipaq seediq.
S.FORM: uxe kesaun mkmhemucta mangan tunux uxe km mkmhemuc maanu di smipaq seediq.
S.PHON: uxe kesaun mkmħemuʦta maŋan tunux uxe km mkmħemuʦ maanu di smipaq seediq.

TRANSL.notes: 並不是我們隨便獵人首級,(或是)隨便砍人.

S.TRANSL: 並不是我們隨便獵人首級, 隨便砍人.

TRANSL.notes: It is not that we hunted heads at will (or) chopped others at will.

S.TRANSL: It is not that we hunted heads at will chopped others at will.

S.FORM: h asi ka a asi ka a asi ka meyah kmremux so pais ma re rih so meyah maanu di a m meyah kmremux alangta na ani naq meyah so mangan so tnalangta peni.
S.PHON: ħ asi ka a asi ka a asi ka mejaħ kmɾemux so pais ma ɾe ɾiħ so mejaħ maanu di a m mejaħ kmɾemux alaŋta na ani naq mejaħ so maŋan so tnalaŋta peni.
S.FORM: h asi ka a asi ka a asi ka meyah kmremux so pais ma re rih so meyah maanu di a m meyah kmremux alangta na ani naq meyah so mangan so tnalangta peni.
S.PHON: ħ asi ka a asi ka a asi ka mejaħ kmɾemux so pais ma ɾe ɾiħ so mejaħ maanu di a m mejaħ kmɾemux alaŋta na ani naq mejaħ so maŋan so tnalaŋta peni.
S.TRANSL: 一定像是當敵人入侵我們部落,或甚至是獵我們部落的人頭.
It must be like when the enemies invade our tribe or even hunt the head of our tribespeople.

S.FORM: so kiya cbeyo han na.
S.PHON: so kija ʦbejo ħan na.
S.FORM: so kiya cbeyo han na.
S.PHON: so kija ʦbejo ħan na.
S.TRANSL: 過去的是那樣的.
It was like that in the past.

S.FORM: so mnguangan tunux han ma asita naq kmciyuk.
S.PHON: so mŋuaŋan tunux ħan ma asita naq kmʦijuk.
S.FORM: so mnguangan tunux han ma asita naq kmciyuk.
S.PHON: so mŋuaŋan tunux ħan ma asita naq kmʦijuk.
S.TRANSL: 我們互相獵首,所以我們自己一定要抵抗.
We hunt each other's head, so we ourselves must resist.

S.FORM: so rseno na asi ka mnangan tunux pais na kiya si patisuntana patis a dqeras.
S.PHON: so ɾseno na asi ka mnaŋan tunux pais na kija si patisuntana patis a dqeɾas.
S.FORM: so rseno na asi ka mnangan tunux pais na kiya si patisuntana patis a dqeras.
S.PHON: so ɾseno na asi ka mnaŋan tunux pais na kija si patisuntana patis a dqeɾas.
S.TRANSL: 像男人就一定要獵過敵首,那樣我們才會被紋面.
Like men must have hunted enemy's heads, so that we can be tattooed on the face.

S.FORM: ma kika m m huwa ka patis dqeras nii ge pnqitaanna meniqta bobo dheran ka kiya.
S.PHON: ma kika m m ħuwa ka patis dqeɾas nii ge pnqitaanna meniqta bobo dħeɾan ka kija.
S.FORM: ma kika m m huwa ka patis dqeras nii ge pnqitaanna meniqta bobo dheran ka kiya.
S.PHON: ma kika m m ħuwa ka patis dqeɾas nii ge pnqitaanna meniqta bobo dħeɾan ka kija.
S.TRANSL: 這個紋面,是我們在世的時候給別人看的.
This face tattoo is to let other people see when we are in the world.

S.FORM: kingan uxe seediq anita naq meniq bobo dheran na kingan uxeta qqitaan we.
S.PHON: kiŋan uxe seediq anita naq meniq bobo dħeɾan na kiŋan uxeta qqitaan we.
S.FORM: kingan uxe seediq anita naq meniq bobo dheran na kingan uxeta qqitaan we.
S.PHON: kiŋan uxe seediq anita naq meniq bobo dħeɾan na kiŋan uxeta qqitaan we.
S.TRANSL: 有一個東西我們人在世的時候看不到.
There is one thing that we people cannot see when living in the world.

S.FORM: kesaun ss kesaunmu rnengoanmu kika rnengoanmu so soni ka m mgdara baga na peni.
S.PHON: kesaun ss kesaunmu ɾneŋoanmu kika ɾneŋoanmu so soni ka m mgdaɾa baga na peni.
S.FORM: kesaun ss kesaunmu rnengoanmu kika rnengoanmu so soni ka m mgdara baga na peni.
S.PHON: kesaun ss kesaunmu ɾneŋoanmu kika ɾneŋoanmu so soni ka m mgdaɾa baga na peni.
S.TRANSL: 我指的是我剛才所說的手上留有血痕.
What I mean is what I just said the blood-staining of hands.

S.FORM: rseno na mnangan tunux na mgdara baga na.
S.PHON: ɾseno na mnaŋan tunux na mgdaɾa baga na.
S.FORM: rseno na mnangan tunux na mgdara baga na.
S.PHON: ɾseno na mnaŋan tunux na mgdaɾa baga na.
S.TRANSL: 獵過人頭的男子手上有血痕.
Men who have hunted heads have blood stain on the hands.

S.FORM: ani naq ga patisan dqerasna ge kingan naq kiya.
S.PHON: ani naq ga patisan dqeɾasna ge kiŋan naq kija.
S.FORM: ani naq ga patisan dqerasna ge kingan naq kiya.
S.PHON: ani naq ga patisan dqeɾasna ge kiŋan naq kija.
S.TRANSL: 即使他有紋面,那是另外一回事.
Although they are tattooed on the face, that is another story.

S.FORM: mqedin uri na mntena naq uri.
S.PHON: mqedin uɾi na mntena naq uɾi.
S.FORM: mqedin uri na mntena naq uri.
S.PHON: mqedin uɾi na mntena naq uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 女人也一樣.
Women are the same.

S.FORM: mqedin we uxe musa mangan tunux ka mqedin di.
S.PHON: mqedin we uxe musa maŋan tunux ka mqedin di.
S.FORM: mqedin we uxe musa mangan tunux ka mqedin di.
S.PHON: mqedin we uxe musa maŋan tunux ka mqedin di.
S.TRANSL: 女人就不是去獵首了.
Women do not go head-hunting.

S.FORM: m kesaun mqedinta ita seediq na asi ka mdrumuc bale maanu di meepah.
S.PHON: m kesaun mqedinta ita seediq na asi ka mdɾumuʦ bale maanu di meepaħ.
S.FORM: m kesaun mqedinta ita seediq na asi ka mdrumuc bale maanu di meepah.
S.PHON: m kesaun mqedinta ita seediq na asi ka mdɾumuʦ bale maanu di meepaħ.
S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克的女性必須非常認真工作.
Our Seediq women must work diligently.

S.FORM: kesaun meepah nii we bale ba cbeyo na tminun.
S.PHON: kesaun meepaħ nii we bale ba ʦbejo na tminun.
S.FORM: kesaun meepah nii we bale ba cbeyo na tminun.
S.PHON: kesaun meepaħ nii we bale ba ʦbejo na tminun.
S.TRANSL: 以前,這個工作真的是織布.
In the past, this work was really weaving.

S.FORM: asi ka mkela ba tminun mqedin we kii si patisandaha dqeras.
S.PHON: asi ka mkela ba tminun mqedin we kii si patisandaħa dqeɾas.
S.FORM: asi ka mkela ba tminun mqedin we kii si patisandaha dqeras.
S.PHON: asi ka mkela ba tminun mqedin we kii si patisandaħa dqeɾas.
S.TRANSL: 女子一定要很會織布,那樣他們才可以紋面.
Women must know weaving really well so they can be tattooed on the face.

S.FORM: ma kesaun mqedin ita seediq na be peeyah naq yani bale yani slaqi wa yani bale ye dehuk so em mpitu hari knkawasdaha di na smluhe tminun di deheya betaq rudan ini qita doriqdaha dumo dmaus peni.
S.PHON: ma kesaun mqedin ita seediq na be peejaħ naq jani bale jani slaqi wa jani bale je deħuk so em mpitu ħaɾi knkawasdaħa di na smluħe tminun di deħeja betaq ɾudan ini qita doɾiqdaħa dumo dmaus peni.
S.FORM: ma kesaun mqedin ita seediq na be peeyah naq yani bale yani slaqi wa yani bale ye dehuk so em mpitu hari knkawasdaha di na smluhe tminun di deheya betaq rudan ini qita doriqdaha dumo dmaus peni.
S.PHON: ma kesaun mqedin ita seediq na be peejaħ naq jani bale jani slaqi wa jani bale je deħuk so em mpitu ħaɾi knkawasdaħa di na smluħe tminun di deħeja betaq ɾudan ini qita doɾiqdaħa dumo dmaus peni.
S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克的女性,大概從...從小的時候,大概真的他們七歲左右開始學織布,直到她們老了,眼睛看不見,沒辦法穿線.
Our Seediq woman, perhaps since they are little...perhaps when they are seven or so, they begin to learn weaving, until they are so old that they can not see and pull threads.

S.FORM: a dehuk so kiya de malix tminun ka.
S.PHON: a deħuk so kija de malix tminun ka.
S.FORM: a dehuk so kiya de malix tminun ka.
S.PHON: a deħuk so kija de malix tminun ka.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)到那時候才停止織布.

S.TRANSL: 到那時候才停止織布.

TRANSL.notes: (They) do not stop weaving until then.

S.TRANSL: do not stop weaving until then.

S.FORM: kesaun mqedin ita seediq kika so kndesandaha mqedin ita seediq nii na so so nii ka qnbsiyaq a nun nanaq eniqundaha bobo dheran hini peni na kn wano ba tminun tminun klaali ka deheya.
S.PHON: kesaun mqedin ita seediq kika so kndesandaħa mqedin ita seediq nii na so so nii ka qnbsijaq a nun nanaq eniqundaħa bobo dħeɾan ħini peni na kn wano ba tminun tminun klaali ka deħeja.
S.FORM: kesaun mqedin ita seediq kika so kndesandaha mqedin ita seediq nii na so so nii ka qnbsiyaq a nun nanaq eniqundaha bobo dheran hini peni na kn wano ba tminun tminun klaali ka deheya.
S.PHON: kesaun mqedin ita seediq kika so kndesandaħa mqedin ita seediq nii na so so nii ka qnbsijaq a nun nanaq eniqundaħa bobo dħeɾan ħini peni na kn wano ba tminun tminun klaali ka deħeja.
S.TRANSL: 我們賽德克女人,他們人生這麼長...他們住在這個世界上.他們每天只有織布再織布.
Our Seediq women, their life is this long...they live in this world. Weaving and weaving is really what they do every day.

S.FORM: kika bagadaha uri na bale ba egu a rih so egu riyung kurang.
S.PHON: kika bagadaħa uɾi na bale ba egu a ɾiħ so egu ɾijuŋ kuɾaŋ.
S.FORM: kika bagadaha uri na bale ba egu a rih so egu riyung kurang.
S.PHON: kika bagadaħa uɾi na bale ba egu a ɾiħ so egu ɾijuŋ kuɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以,她們的手上就真的很多繭.
Therefore, on their hands are really many calluses

S.FORM: qtehun kurangdaha peni saadux kurangdaha kurangdaha baga wa.
S.PHON: qteħun kuɾaŋdaħa peni saadux kuɾaŋdaħa kuɾaŋdaħa baga wa.
S.FORM: qtehun kurangdaha peni saadux kurangdaha kurangdaha baga wa.
S.PHON: qteħun kuɾaŋdaħa peni saadux kuɾaŋdaħa kuɾaŋdaħa baga wa.
S.TRANSL: 他們的繭很胖...他們手上的繭很硬.
Their calluses are fat...their calluses on the hands are still.

S.FORM: ma ma kesaun kurang baga nii uri na adosu dmoi kesaun kurang baga nii uri na adosu dmoi gikus klaali mesa a tminun han na kong kong mesa peni na.
S.PHON: ma ma kesaun kuɾaŋ baga nii uɾi na adosu dmoi kesaun kuɾaŋ baga nii uɾi na adosu dmoi gikus klaali mesa a tminun ħan na koŋ koŋ mesa peni na.
S.FORM: ma ma kesaun kurang baga nii uri na adosu dmoi kesaun kurang baga nii uri na adosu dmoi gikus klaali mesa a tminun han na kong kong mesa peni na.
S.PHON: ma ma kesaun kuɾaŋ baga nii uɾi na adosu dmoi kesaun kuɾaŋ baga nii uɾi na adosu dmoi gikus klaali mesa a tminun ħan na koŋ koŋ mesa peni na.
S.TRANSL: 手上有這些繭,因為你握著織布機每天織布,「貢、貢」像這樣.
There are these calluses on the hands because you grip the loom to weave every day, "kong, kong" like this.

S.FORM: mntena rseno uri mgdara baga mqedin duri.
S.PHON: mntena ɾseno uɾi mgdaɾa baga mqedin duɾi.
S.FORM: mntena rseno uri mgdara baga mqedin duri.
S.PHON: mntena ɾseno uɾi mgdaɾa baga mqedin duɾi.
S.TRANSL: 女性的手掌像男性的一樣有血痕.
Women's hands are also blood-stained just like men's.

S.FORM: kika mudata pqita baga maha mmahata inu di tlangan utuxta a utux rudanta di na.
S.PHON: kika mudata pqita baga maħa mmaħata inu di tlaŋan utuxta a utux ɾudanta di na.
S.FORM: kika mudata pqita baga maha mmahata inu di tlangan utuxta a utux rudanta di na.
S.PHON: kika mudata pqita baga maħa mmaħata inu di tlaŋan utuxta a utux ɾudanta di na.
S.TRANSL: 所以,當我們要去祖靈之地時,我們要檢視手掌.
Thus, when we are going to the gathering place of our ancestors, we have our hands examined.

S.FORM: mntena rseno daka mqedin pqitata baga di na.
S.PHON: mntena ɾseno daka mqedin pqitata baga di na.
S.FORM: mntena rseno daka mqedin pqitata baga di na.
S.PHON: mntena ɾseno daka mqedin pqitata baga di na.
S.TRANSL: 男人和女人一樣,要檢視手掌.

TRANSL.notes: Man and woman are qual. (They) have hands examined.

S.TRANSL: Man and woman are qual. have hands examined.

S.FORM: ima si mgdara de irih so heya ka bale ba km km muudus meniq bobo dheran han na kmdakan kmdakan a quri alangta.
S.PHON: ima si mgdaɾa de iɾiħ so ħeja ka bale ba km km muudus meniq bobo dħeɾan ħan na kmdakan kmdakan a quɾi alaŋta.
S.FORM: ima si mgdara de irih so heya ka bale ba km km muudus meniq bobo dheran han na kmdakan kmdakan a quri alangta.
S.PHON: ima si mgdaɾa de iɾiħ so ħeja ka bale ba km km muudus meniq bobo dħeɾan ħan na kmdakan kmdakan a quɾi alaŋta.
S.TRANSL: 有血痕的人,他們真的住在世界上的時候,保護了部落.
Whoever are blood-stained, they have really protected our tribe when living in the world.

S.FORM: so nii ka karina tngesaankuna a rdrudan alang ha.
S.PHON: so nii ka kaɾina tŋesaankuna a ɾdɾudan alaŋ ħa.
S.FORM: so nii ka karina tngesaankuna a rdrudan alang ha.
S.PHON: so nii ka kaɾina tŋesaankuna a ɾdɾudan alaŋ ħa.
S.TRANSL: 這就是部落的長者們教我的話.
This is the word that the elderly in the tribe taught me.

S.FORM: ni nii ge ini pntena kesaun karita hndure osaunta mbahang kyokay ha.
S.PHON: ni nii ge ini pntena kesaun kaɾita ħnduɾe osaunta mbaħaŋ kjokaj ħa.
S.FORM: ni nii ge ini pntena kesaun karita hndure osaunta mbahang kyokay ha.
S.PHON: ni nii ge ini pntena kesaun kaɾita ħnduɾe osaunta mbaħaŋ kjokaj ħa.
S.TRANSL: 這個和我們近期去做禮拜所聽到的不一樣.
This is different from what we hear in the church recently.

S.FORM: a eniqan a eniqan tenggoku eniqan jugoku mesa peni.
S.PHON: a eniqan a eniqan teŋgoku eniqan jugoku mesa peni.
S.FORM: a eniqan a eniqan tenggoku eniqan jugoku mesa peni.
S.PHON: a eniqan a eniqan teŋgoku eniqan jugoku mesa peni.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)說有天堂有地獄.

S.TRANSL: 說有天堂有地獄.

TRANSL.notes: (They) say there are heaven and hell.

S.TRANSL: say there are heaven and hell.

S.FORM: ini pntena i ini.
S.PHON: ini pntena i ini.
S.FORM: ini pntena i ini.
S.PHON: ini pntena i ini.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)不一樣.

S.TRANSL: 不一樣.
They are different.

S.FORM: huwa ka a maanu di netunta supuun lmngelung hini na netunsu so a.
S.PHON: ħuwa ka a maanu di netunta supuun lmŋeluŋ ħini na netunsu so a.
S.FORM: huwa ka a maanu di netunta supuun lmngelung hini na netunsu so a.
S.PHON: ħuwa ka a maanu di netunta supuun lmŋeluŋ ħini na netunsu so a.
S.TRANSL: 如果我們一起在這裡思考...如果你...
If we think together here...if you...

S.FORM: adoku ka ga mangan kari utux baro ka yaku uri uri peni na ye kika lmngelungku we ma so hari mntena mesaku lmngelung.
S.PHON: adoku ka ga maŋan kaɾi utux baɾo ka jaku uɾi uɾi peni na je kika lmŋeluŋku we ma so ħaɾi mntena mesaku lmŋeluŋ.
S.FORM: adoku ka ga mangan kari utux baro ka yaku uri uri peni na ye kika lmngelungku we ma so hari mntena mesaku lmngelung.
S.PHON: adoku ka ga maŋan kaɾi utux baɾo ka jaku uɾi uɾi peni na je kika lmŋeluŋku we ma so ħaɾi mntena mesaku lmŋeluŋ.
S.TRANSL: 因為我也信主耶穌,所以我想他們怎麼這麼像.
Because I also believe in Jesus, I wonder how they are similar.

S.FORM: e bale ba bale ba ge yaani eniqan tikuh inina pntena uri.
S.PHON: e bale ba bale ba ge jaani eniqan tikuħ inina pntena uɾi.
S.FORM: e bale ba bale ba ge yaani eniqan tikuh inina pntena uri.
S.PHON: e bale ba bale ba ge jaani eniqan tikuħ inina pntena uɾi.
S.TRANSL: 事實上,或許也有一些東西不一樣.
In fact, there are something which is not the same.

S.FORM: dehuk hini karimu ha kiya.
S.PHON: deħuk ħini kaɾimu ħa kija.
S.FORM: dehuk hini karimu ha kiya.
S.PHON: deħuk ħini kaɾimu ħa kija.
S.TRANSL: 我的話就到這裡.就這樣.
My word ends here. That is it.
